hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ /\.env(\.[^/]+)?$ ]]; then echo 'Blocked: .env files must be edited manually (contains Firebase/Stripe/LLM secrets)' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|md|json)$ ]] && [[ -f "$FILE" ]]; then npx --no-install prettier --config config/lint/.prettierrc --write "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; exit 0
